message:
refactor(traits): One function per file for transparent discovery

Core Principles added to CLAUDE.md:
- Transparent by Default: folder structure IS documentation
- Lazy by Default, Zero Copy: avoid allocations
- One Function Per File: each trait in own file with header comment

New trait folders (66 files total):
- type_traits/: isNumeric, isIndexable, binaryResultType, etc.
- string_traits/: isStringLike, canConcat, getReprFn, etc.
- container_traits/: isList, supportsPush, getElementType, etc.
- operator_traits/: getModuloSemantics, needsFloatModulo, etc.
- function_traits/: needsAllocator, isPure, canUseTCO, etc.

Also fixes pub functions for imported modules in test runner.
